---
title: "basic_table"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
library(kableExtra)
```


```{r}
basic_table <- function(my_data){
  tab1 <- my_data %>%
      summarise(
        "sample id" = first(sample_id),
        "run id" = first(run_id),
        "duration" = max(start_time + duration, na.rm = TRUE) / 3600,
        "number of reads" = n())
  
}
```

```{r}
 
tab1_database <- lapply(seqsum_database, basic_table)
print(tab1_database)
```

```{r}
joinedtab <- dplyr::bind_rows(tab1_database)
print(joinedtab)
```

```{r}


```
